text:

Author: pizzamig

Log:
  sysutils/py-hpilo: Update to 4.4.2

  Add support to python 3.9
  Remove RC4-SHA cypher support (not available in openssl any longer)
  RC4-SHA cypther can be added back via the specific option

  PR:	250716
  Submitted by:	Matthias Pfaller <matthias.pfaller@familie-pfaller.de>
